source_meaning: alternative form of رَشَّ المِلْحَ عَلَى الجُرْحِ (rašša l-milḥa ʕalā l-jurḥi)
target_meaning: To practice the custom of using bread and salt to make solemn an oath or affirmation.

source_meaning: to get caught red-handed (to get caught immediately after doing something wrong or illegal)
